Name: Eastman 1600W 130 Bar Induction Pressure Car Washer Water Pump 6.5 L Min Flow Washing Bike Home Cleaning
Description: POWERFUL CLEANING PERFORMANCE: The Eastman Induction High-Pressure Car Washer is a versatile cleaning tool designed for car, bike, and home cleaning purposes. With a working pressure of 90 Bar and a maximum pressure of 130 Bar, it delivers high-pressure water for effective cleaning. HIGH-WATER FLOW: This car washer features a water flow rate of 6.5 L/Min, allowing you to clean large surfaces quickly and efficiently. Whether you're cleaning your vehicle, bike, or home exteriors, the high-water flow rate gets the job done effectively. ADDITIONAL ACCESSORIES: The package includes an 8-meter outlet pipe, providing ample reach for various cleaning tasks. Moreover, it comes with a 250 ml foam bottle that enables you to apply foam directly through the machine, enhancing the cleaning process.
